texto: I remember for my 18th birthday, I was going to get a tattoo, and I made the mistake of thinking I was a man and telling my father, and he was like, 'Oh yeah? You better tattoo a new address on your arm, because you're not living here!' And that was the end of that discussion.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Adam Ferrara: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “I remember for my 18th birthday, I was going to get a tattoo, and I made the mistake of thinking …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, father, man pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de aniversario e termino.

frase_original: I remember for my 18th birthday, I was going to get a tattoo, and I made the mistake of thinking I was a man and telling my father, and he was like, 'Oh yeah? You better tattoo a new address on your arm, because you're not living here!' And that was the end of that discussion.
